com.google.android.material.card.Materia:

android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bg_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:strokeColor="@color/border_subtle" app:strokeWidth="1dp"> >>>>>>> final
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical"> ======= android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp"> >>>>>>> final
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_type_icon" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:src="@drawable/ic_pdf" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:background="@color/bg_surface_raised" android:padding="8dp"/> ======= android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:background="@color/bg_surface_raised" android:padding="8dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_pdf" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:text="Material Title"/> ======= android:text="Material Title" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_description" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" android:text="Description"/> ======= android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:text="Description" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_uploaded_by" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:text="Uploaded by"/> ======= android:text="Uploaded by" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:textSize="11sp" /> >>>>>>> final
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_open" <<<<<<< HEAD android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Open" android:textSize="12sp" style="@style/ClassConnect.Button.Outlined"/> ======= style="@style/ClassConnect.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Open" android:textSize="12sp" /> >>>>>>> final
